features: 【Christmas bags】The xmas gift bags set contains 30 foil gift bags, 30 tags and 30 strings. 4 extra large gift bags (44x57cm), 2 large gift bags (39x51cm), 6 medium gift bags (29x43cm), 12 small gift bags (24x32cm), 6 extra small gift bags (16x24cm).

【Exquisite patterns】The xmas drawstring gift bags comes in 15 different patterns, with 6 different labels that combine elements such as Santa Claus, Christmas tree, reindeer, sled, candles, gingerbread man, and more. Decorate your gifts with these Christmas themed gift bags, making your Christmas full of surprises and joy.

【High quality materials】The Christmas drawstring bags is made of high-quality foil material, which can be reused and is not easily damaged. The material of the drawstring is soft and tough, not easy to break, and can be used with confidence.

【Easy to use】The drawstring gift bags features a unique drawstring design. When you need to package a gift, simply pull the string lightly and the bag will quickly close, tightly wrapping the gift inside. Especially suitable for use in busy holiday atmospheres, allowing you to create a beautiful packaging for gifts without spending too much time and energy.

【Wide application】Christmas party gift bags can be used to package gifts such as dolls, books, clothes, jewelry, candies, chocolates, etc. Christmas party bags are not just a form of packaging, but also a means of conveying emotions. Gift goody bags wrap people's blessings and care inside, giving them to relatives and friends, allowing them to feel warmth and joy on this special holiday.
description: Product Description During Christmas, family members exchange gifts with each other and wrap them in Christmas gift bags to enhance the festive atmosphere. You can put the gift under the Christmas tree and wait for your family to open it together, enjoying a warm moment.
